problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
hypothesis: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Magnetohydrodynamic. Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
